# NSPreferencePaneUnselectReply.unselectCancel

**Case**

Cancel the deselection.

## Declaration

```swift
case unselectCancel
```

## Replies

- **NSPreferencePaneUnselectReply.unselectNow**: Continue the deselection.
- **NSPreferencePaneUnselectReply.unselectLater**: Delay the deselection until the preference pane invokes [doc://com.apple.preferencepanes/documentation/PreferencePanes/NSPreferencePane/reply(toShouldUnselect:)].
